title: lasianthus subaureus
intro: Lasianthus subaureus, also known as the golden Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and is also used to treat digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus subaureus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
